description.overview: The largest and most substantial of all setters, Gordons are loyal, devoted dogs with striking black and tan coats. They're excellent hunters and family companions.
description.history: The Gordon Setter originated in Scotland.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, confident, fearless.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their soft, shiny, slightly wavy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The largest and most substantial of all setters, Gordons are loyal, devoted dogs with striking black and tan coats. They're excellent hunters and family companions.
